canonical_definition: The latent capacity of a model to interpret and understand visual elements, particularly icons and graphical widgets, in GUI environments, independent of textual cues.
papers: Reverse Prompt Engineering: A Zero-Shot, Genetic Algorithm Approach to Language Model Inversion
Where to show Demos in Your Prompt: A Positional Bias of In-Context Learning

definitions.text: The latent capacity of a model to interpret and understand visual elements, particularly icons and graphical widgets, in GUI environments, independent of textual cues.
definitions.paper: Reverse Prompt Engineering: A Zero-Shot, Genetic Algorithm Approach to Language Model Inversion

definitions.text: The model's capacity to extract and utilize visual characteristics of rendered text, especially in early layers, to support language understanding across scripts.
